title: Checkpoint & Model Management

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Runs download scripts to acquire model checkpoints locally

actors.name: HuggingFace Hub
actors.description: Remote model registry; accessed via snapshot_download()

use_cases.name: Download Lyra Checkpoints
use_cases.notes: Imports download_guardrail_checkpoints but extra_models list is empty; no guardrail call in main

use_cases.name: Download Gen3C Checkpoints
use_cases.notes: Always pulls tokenizer CV8x8x8-720p and T5-11B alongside Gen3C model

use_cases.name: Download Tokenizer Checkpoints
use_cases.notes: Explicitly calls download_guardrail_checkpoints(checkpoint_dir) at end of main

use_cases.name: Download Guardrail Checkpoints
use_cases.notes: Standalone script and shared utility; called by UC3 (tokenizer) and imported by UC1/UC2

use_cases.name: Verify MD5 Checksum
use_cases.logic: Skip download if MD5 matches; trigger download if file absent or hash mismatch
use_cases.notes: Each script has its own MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP dict covering its specific models

use_cases.name: Convert Pixtral Checkpoint
steps: Split weights into vit_ckpt, projector_ckpt, llm_ckpt
Reassemble as vlm_ckpt dict with model./mm_projector./vision_encoder. prefixes
Validate vision encoder config against expected 400M ViT spec
Save model.pt + config.json to checkpoint_name subdirectory
use_cases.notes: Converts bfloat16; validates config keys match hardcoded 400M ViT spec (dim=1024, n_layers=24, n_heads=16)

use_cases.name: Select Tokenizer Types
use_cases.notes: Developer chooses subset of 8 tokenizer variants via --tokenizer_types CLI arg in UC3

relationships: Developer initiates UC4 (Download Guardrail Checkpoints) standalone
UC1 <<extend>> UC6 (Convert Pixtral Checkpoint) — available but not auto-triggered in main
UC2 <<extend>> UC6 (Convert Pixtral Checkpoint) — available but not auto-triggered in main
UC1 uses HuggingFace Hub via snapshot_download()
UC2 uses HuggingFace Hub via snapshot_download()
UC3 uses HuggingFace Hub via snapshot_download()
UC4 uses HuggingFace Hub via snapshot_download()
shared_patterns: All scripts: parse_args() → main(args) entry point
All scripts: pathlib.Path for directory management
Lyra + Gen3C: identical convert_pixtral_checkpoint() function (code duplication)
Lyra + Gen3C: identical get_md5_checksum() with different MD5_CHECKSUM_LOOKUP dicts
Tokenizer: get_md5_checksum() variant iterates all entries starting with model_name
important_notes: download_guardrail_checkpoints is a shared utility in its own module; UC3 (tokenizer) is the only script that calls it from main(). UC1 and UC2 import it but never invoke it in their main flows. The guardrail models are Llama-Guard-3-8B + Cosmos-Guardrail1. All HF downloads use local_dir_use_symlinks=False.
